title: achneria capillaris
intro: Achneria capillaris, also known as Achnatherum capillaris, is a type of grass native to Western North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Achnatherum capillaris is often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is also used in topical applications for skin conditions and wounds.
